evals.prompt: hey my friend anthraxit is getting stutters, here's his spark profile: https://spark.lucko.me/tjm0YswAhI
evals.expected_output: A structured analysis identifying DH render-thread blocking, EMF/ETF overhead, RAM exhaustion/swap, ZGC on client as main issues with actionable fixes

evals.prompt: https://spark.lucko.me/yWdvkNEkM3 this player says their fps drops to like 30 sometimes, can you figure out why?
evals.expected_output: Analysis showing DH network processing on render thread (~12%), system RAM at 88% with heavy swap, EMF animation cost, and Subtle Effects tick overhead

evals.prompt: can you look at https://spark.lucko.me/olrVn3QGTt and tell me what's wrong and what they should change?
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis with system summary, health table, top bottlenecks ranked by impact, and numbered fix recommendations with categories
